name: Round tower
description: Defensive round tower inscribed in an AABB. Builds a hollow @primary cylinder of radius min(W,D)//2 centered on the AABB, a solid @secondary floor disc at the base, a crenellated battlement crown at the top (alternating merlons and air-gap crenels around the rim), four narrow @glass window slits at mid-height on the cardinal directions, a 1x2 door cut on the +z side, and a single @light lantern hanging near the top of the interior.

required_furniture.rule: Hollow @primary cylinder, radius = min(W,D)//2, full AABB height.
Top-course crenellation: alternating @primary merlons and air crenels around the rim.
Narrow @glass slit at mid-height on each cardinal direction (N/S/E/W); 1-2 blocks tall depending on tower height.
1-wide, 2-tall opening on the accessible (+z) side at y0..y0+1, cut by overwriting wall cells with cave_air.
One minecraft:lantern at the center of the interior near the top course for night-time defense lighting.

placement_rules: Battlement crown at top with alternating crenels
Floor disc of @secondary forms a solid base distinguishable from the wall material
Lantern placed above mid-height so it lights both upper floor and the door opening
lighting_ventilation: Cardinal window slits provide minimal but defensive natural light + ventilation; a single interior lantern keeps the tower mob-safe on Java 1.16.5 light-level rules. Open crenels in the battlement double as sky-light wells at the top.

medieval.notes: Cobblestone keep with stone-brick floor and lantern light — the canonical castle watchtower.

modern.notes: Smooth-quartz silo with andesite floor — reads as an observation tower or lighthouse base.

fantasy.notes: Dark-timber wizard tower on mossy footing with purple stained-glass slits and a sea-lantern beacon.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.round_tower.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
